rationale: Harness now builds frontend assets so most specs pass (176/189), but `bun run test:e2e` still exits non-zero with 13 failures, contradicting AC #1 (`exits 0`). Author claims remaining failures (screenshots/a11y/demo) are out-of-scope follow-ups, but AC #1 is unconditional.

findings.summary: AC #1 requires `bun run test:e2e` to exit 0; commit message reports 13 failing specs, so the suite still exits 1. Bead description scopes-out screenshot rebaselining and demo-recording, but AC #1 itself is not conditioned on that — either AC must be amended or the remaining failures (a11y agent-page contrast in particular, which is not flagged out-of-scope) must be addressed.
AC #2 says 196 tests run today or more; commit reports 189 (176 pass + 13 fail). Need to confirm no specs were dropped during migration of earlier child beads.
Adding `bun run build` to webServer.command makes harness genuinely self-contained; runbook updated correctly to reflect the new step.
